Frame assets must follow this structure:

/public/frames/{FRAME_ID}/front.png
/public/frames/{FRAME_ID}/closeup.png
/public/frames/{FRAME_ID}/diffuse.jpg

Example:
/public/frames/L1532/front.png
/public/frames/L1532/closeup.png
/public/frames/L1532/diffuse.jpg

If any asset is missing, the configurator falls back cleanly to a placeholder card or gradient frame preview.
